measurable_implication: price_impact_per_unit_flow (Kyle lambda proxy rises with informed flow)
operational_value: scale down urgency when impact proxy spikes
execution_implication: aggressive entries increase implementation shortfall under low resiliency
contradiction_awareness: breakout signal conflicts with rising impact cost
failure_awareness: paper portfolio fills at decision price; live fills drift — Perold IS

operational_value: reduce size when vol/baseline ratio < 0.15 (fill degradation proxy)
execution_implication: missed trade opportunity cost rises in illiquid bars
contradiction_awareness: stable structure label vs rising illiquidity ratio
failure_awareness: limit-order illusion — good average price hides unfilled intent (Hasbrouck TCA)

measurable_implication: bid-ask spread expands when adverse selection probability rises
operational_value: halt new entries when spread_spike guard fails
execution_implication: market maker widens quotes — execution cost non-linear
contradiction_awareness: tradable flag vs spread guard fail
failure_awareness: continuing to trade into widened spread doubles IS delay + impact
